summary: A decent but imperfect recording that still delivers the memorable Casey Jones performance and a subtle Heaven Help the Fool tease in Space.
review: The show is remembered for a youthful, high‑energy rendition of "Casey Jones" and an elusive "Heaven Help the Fool" tease woven into the middle of Space. While the tape suffers from some sound‑quality issues, listeners appreciate that the China/Rider segment is kept intact, preserving the set’s flow.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviewers gave four stars and highlighted positive aspects of both performance and recording despite noted sound issues; consistency across reviews yields high confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers note audible sound issues (drop‑outs/muddiness) but consider the tape still listenable; no explicit source type identified.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set is praised for keeping the China/Rider portion together as intended, and the transition into Space with a Heaven Help the Fool tease adds an intriguing moment.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Contributes subtly to the Heaven Help the Fool tease during Space.
band_member_comments.Phil: Adds a slight part to the same tease.
